source_file: Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf

text_blocks.text: Wrap the strap around the aluminum plate and place the aluminum plate into the enclosure. Attach with included mounting screws. Secure mounting strap by buckling it around the plate.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Connect antenna to CELLULAR SMA jack on modem and tighten with a pliers or wrench.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Apply a zip tie and label with 'PV IN' around the PV+/- pigtail wires.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Attach 10FT outdoor ethernet cable to DATA OUT of PoE injector and coil inside enclosure. Retain with zip tie for shipping.
text_blocks.label: list_item

figures.label: page_screenshot

full_text: Wrap the strap around the aluminum plate and place the aluminum plate into the enclosure. Attach with included mounting screws. Secure mounting strap by buckling it around the plate. Connect antenna to CELLULAR SMA jack on modem and tighten with a pliers or wrench. Apply a zip tie and label with 'PV IN' around the PV+/- pigtail wires. Attach 10FT outdoor ethernet cable to DATA OUT of PoE injector and coil inside enclosure. Retain with zip tie for shipping.
